stacks.description: Team dynamics and engineering culture concepts

stacks.description: Software architecture patterns and principles

stacks.description: Distributed systems and scalability concepts

stacks.description: Critical Rendering Path, V8 Engine, Event Loop, and browser mechanics

stacks.description: Specificity, Flexbox, CSS Grid, Box Model, and modern CSS features

stacks.description: Core Web Vitals, lazy loading, debouncing, and optimization techniques

stacks.name: Basic Accessibility (a11y)
stacks.description: ARIA roles, screen readers, semantic HTML, and WCAG standards

stacks.description: ACID, normalization, joins, indexes, and transactional integrity

stacks.description: Sharding, CAP Theorem, eventual consistency, and non-relational models

stacks.description: Images, layers, volumes, Dockerfiles, and container orchestration

stacks.name: Intermediate Kubernetes
stacks.description: Pods, nodes, ingress, deployments, and cluster management

stacks.name: Intermediate AWS Cloud
stacks.description: EC2, S3, Lambda, VPC, and AWS cloud infrastructure

stacks.name: Basic Networking
stacks.description: TCP/UDP, DNS, IP, OSI Model, and internet mechanics

stacks.name: Basic Web Security
stacks.description: XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, CORS, and web security best practices

stacks.name: Intermediate Auth & Identity
stacks.description: OAuth2, JWT, OIDC, MFA, and modern identity management

stacks.description: Encryption, hashing, PKI, and digital signatures

stacks.name: Intermediate Android

stacks.description: Generics, union types, interfaces, and advanced type logic

stacks.name: Advanced Rust
stacks.description: Ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, traits, and memory safety

stacks.name: Intermediate Go (Golang)
stacks.description: Goroutines, channels, interfaces, and Go runtime mechanics

stacks.name: Advanced Data Structures
stacks.description: B-Trees, heaps, graphs, tries, and complex data organization

stacks.name: Advanced AI/ML

stacks.description: Unit testing, test runners, assertions, and fundamental testing concepts

stacks.name: Advanced Testing

stacks.description: Request/response pipelines, interceptors, and middleware fundamentals
